findings.jp_actual: Translated output has no field capturing the callout 'コレが出る！' that appears in OCR source
findings.jp_expected: Callout/badge text 'コレが出る！' should be preserved — it is a pedagogical signal marking high-frequency exam items
findings.trace: OCR source (page_341.md line 3) clearly shows 'コレが出る！' callout before the question block. This text is absent from all translated entity fields. The 3 question JP stems and choices are accurate and complete (Q0 stack LIFO, Q1 algorithm trace x=5, Q2 HTML tags). Answer indices verified: Q0→イ(1), Q1→イ(1), Q2→ウ(2). No answer-letter substitution detected. Also: ZH choices for Q1 retain 'ウ/エ' JP-label prefixes instead of C/D.
findings.recommended_fix: Preserve 'コレが出る！' as a note/callout entity. Fix JP choice-label leakage in ZH fields.
